en_title: Marvel Tokon Blocked in 132 Countries, and It Looks Like PSN Requirements Are to Blame
cn_title: 《Marvel Tokon》在132个国家锁区，疑似PSN要求导致
subtitle: PSN门槛又来了
opus_summary: PlayStation与Arc System Works的《Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls》在132个国家被Steam锁区，玩家认为原因是这些地区无法访问PSN。类似争议曾在《绝地潜兵2》上发生。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation and Arc System Works' Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls has been blocked in 132 countries in what appears to be another example of Sony's PSN requirements barring players from access on Steam.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation和Arc System Works的《Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls》已在132个国家被锁区，这看起来又是索尼PSN要求阻止玩家在Steam访问游戏的一个例子。

paragraphs.en: Fans of the upcoming tag-team comic book fighting game have prepared to skip out on its August 2026 launch after it was revealed that a long list of regions will be blocked (via SteamDB ). The full list of 132 countries includes Afghanistan, Haiti, Serbia, Zimbabwe, Egypt, and more.
paragraphs.cn: 这款即将推出的组队漫画格斗游戏被曝出会屏蔽一长串地区后，粉丝已经准备跳过它的2026年8月发售。根据SteamDB，完整的132个国家名单包括阿富汗、海地、塞尔维亚、津巴布韦、埃及等。

paragraphs.en: Why Marvel Tokon has been blocked in these areas has not been explicitly stated, but fans think they've figured out the cause. It just so happens that the PlayStation Network is unavailable to access in any of the countries on the list.
paragraphs.cn: 《Marvel Tokon》为何会在这些地区被屏蔽，官方并未明确说明，但粉丝认为自己已经找到了原因。恰好，名单上的所有国家都无法访问PlayStation Network。

paragraphs.en: It's a situation that should feel familiar to PlayStation fans. In 2024, developer Arrowhead Studios confirmed that a lack of PSN access would block Helldivers 2 across a similar list of territories with an update. Thankfully, Sony eventually reversed course on that matter , announcing that it would no longer launch that update across PlayStation 5 and PC versions of the experience.
paragraphs.cn: 这对PlayStation粉丝来说应该很熟悉。2024年，开发商Arrowhead Studios曾确认，由于缺乏PSN访问权限，《绝地潜兵2》将在类似地区名单中通过更新被屏蔽。好在索尼最终在这件事上改变方向，宣布不再在PlayStation 5和PC版本中推出该更新。

paragraphs.en: Though the number of affected locations totaled 177 for Helldivers 2, there are still plenty of PS5 fans across Marvel Tokon's 132 affected countries who will no doubt be displeased to hear they won't be able to play at launch. Arc System Works has yet to publicly comment on the controversy, but IGN has reached out for clarification.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然《绝地潜兵2》受影响地区总数达到177个，但在《Marvel Tokon》受影响的132个国家中，仍然有大量PS5粉丝听到自己无法在首发时游玩后无疑会感到不满。Arc System Works尚未公开评论这场争议，但IGN已联系对方寻求说明。

paragraphs.en: Sony's Interactive Entertainment wing has put itself in the hot seat several times in the last few weeks. An internal document recently suggested the PlayStation maker was shifting away from releasing its single-player titles on PC. Last week, the company announced it would end physical disc production for new games in early 2028 . Now, the company is back in players' crosshairs as Marvel fans learn the new fighting game will be blocked from access.
paragraphs.cn: 过去几周，索尼互动娱乐部门已经多次把自己推上风口浪尖。最近一份内部文件暗示，这家PlayStation制造商正在远离把单人作品发行到PC的策略。上周，公司宣布将在2028年初停止为新游戏生产实体光盘。现在，随着漫威粉丝得知这款新格斗游戏将无法访问，公司又回到了玩家的准星中。

paragraphs.en: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls has a release date of August 6, 2026, for PC and PS5. Along with headlining playable heroes like Captain America, Iron Man, and Spider-Man, the developer recently announced that Blade, Deadpool, and Loki , as well as Carnage, Green Goblin, and Magneto , will also be available. For more, you can read IGN's interview with the team .
paragraphs.cn: 《Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls》定于2026年8月6日登陆PC和PS5。除了美国队长、钢铁侠和蜘蛛侠等领衔可玩英雄外，开发商最近还宣布刀锋战士、死侍和Loki，以及Carnage、绿魔和Magneto也会登场。更多内容，你可以阅读IGN对团队的采访。
